examples: She woke up to the sound of the alarm clock

meanings.definition: summon into action or bring into existence, often as if by magic
examples: he conjured wild birds in the air
call down the spirits from the mountain

meanings.definition: cause to be alert and energetic
cause to become awake or conscious
examples: He was roused by the drunken men in the street
As the thunder started the sleeping children began to stir
This movie usually arouses the male audience
